# ZeroвҖ‘Build SaaS Template

## рҹҺҜ What You Are Building

* A SaaS starter that runs directly from vanilla TypeScript in Bun, with no build step.
* 99 percent of the codebase is generated by the **Claude Code tool**. Human reviewers keep quality high.

## рҹӣ  Core Tech Stack

| Layer    | Choice & Notes                                                   |
| -------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Runtime  | **BunВ 1.x** вҖ“ ESM, hot reload, builtвҖ‘in test runner              |
| Language | **TypeScriptВ 5** targeting `es2022`                              |
| Database | **Postgres + pgvector** via Bun`s native `sql\` client           |
| ORM      | **Drizzle** вҖ“ pure TS, zero build                                |
| Auth     | **Lucia** вҖ“ fetchвҖ‘based middleware only                          |
| UI       | **HTML + HTMX + Web Components** shipped as ES modules           |
| Styling  | CDN CSS (**Picocss**) вҖ“ no tooling                               |
| DevВ Ops  | Docker (`oven/bun` image) deploying to Fly.io, Railway or Render |

## рҹ“Ӯ Recommended Folder Layout

````text
myвҖ‘saas/
в”ңв”Җ src/
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ server.ts                вҶҗ Bun.serve entry
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ routes/
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җ _manifest.ts         вҶҗ autoвҖ‘generated registry
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   в””в”Җ healthcheck.ts       вҶҗ example GET /health
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ jobs/
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   в””в”Җ nightlyвҖ‘summary.ts   вҶҗ cron demo
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ lib/
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җ db.ts                вҶҗ Drizzle client & helpers
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җ ai.ts                вҶҗ Claude/OpenAI wrapper
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   в””в”Җ auth.ts              вҶҗ Lucia session helpers
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ web/
в”Ӯ      в”ңв”Җ index.html           вҶҗ base HTML + PicoCSS + importвҖ‘map
в”Ӯ      в”ңв”Җ importвҖ‘map.json      вҶҗ CDN resolves
в”Ӯ      в”ңв”Җ components/
в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ   в””в”Җ promptвҖ‘box.ts    вҶҗ Web Component example
в”Ӯ      в””в”Җ assets/              вҶҗ icons, favicons
в”ңв”Җ static/
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ util.css                 вҶҗ handвҖ‘rolled utility classes
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ images/                  вҶҗ logo, hero, etc.
в”ңв”Җ scripts/
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ create-feature.ts        вҶҗ Claude scaffolder
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ fix-bugs.ts              вҶҗ Claude scaffolder
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ migrate.ts               вҶҗ database migrations
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ seed.ts                  вҶҗ seed data
в”ңв”Җ prompts/                    вҶҗ prompt snippets for Claude
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ styleвҖ‘guide.md
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ dbвҖ‘access.md
в”ңв”Җ tests/                      вҶҗ bun test specs
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ server.test.ts
в”ңв”Җ .env.example
в”ңв”Җ .editorconfig
в”ңв”Җ .gitignore
в”ңв”Җ bunfig.toml
в”ңв”Җ tsconfig.json
в”ңв”Җ README.md
в””в”Җ Dockerfile
````

## вҡЎ OneвҖ‘Command Dev Loop

1. `bun install`
2. `bun run dev`

   * starts `bun --hot src/server.ts`
   * runs `bunx tsc --noEmit --watch` in parallel

## рҹӨ– AIвҖ‘Assisted Workflow With Claude Code

* Store reusable prompt snippets in `/prompts` (e.g. `styleвҖ‘guide.md`, `dbвҖ‘access.md`).
* `scripts/createвҖ‘page.ts` calls the **Claude Code tool**:

  * injects prompt snippets
  * generates route, tests and docs
  * updates the routes manifest automatically
* Each feature branch includes its Claude chat transcript in the PR description.
* CI gates: `tsc --noEmit`, `bun test`, `eslint`, `prettier --check`.

## рҹ”’ Quality and Safety Guardrails

* Strict TypeScript settings like `noUncheckedIndexedAccess` and `exactOptionalPropertyTypes`.
* ESLint and Prettier on preвҖ‘commit hooks (husky).
* Tests first вҖ“ Claude can draft them.
* Two human reviewers for every AIвҖ‘generated pull request.
* Security checklist: parameterised SQL and user input validation.

## рҹҡҖ Deployment Cheatsheet

* `docker build -t my-saas .` uses the `oven/bun` base image.
* Push to host, then run `bun build src/server.ts --compile` for small cold start.
* Execute `scripts/migrate.ts` on release to apply migrations.

## вҳ‘пёҸ Developer FirstвҖ‘Feature Checklist

&#x20;  \[ ] Clone repo and copy \`.env.example\` to \`.env\` &#x20;

&#x20;  \[ ] \`bun install\` &#x20;

&#x20;  \[ ] \`bun run page my-feature\`  scaffolds new route with Claude Code &#x20;

&#x20;  \[ ] Chat with Claude Code, include prompt snippets &#x20;

&#x20;  \[ ] Ensure unit tests pass with \`bun test\` &#x20;

&#x20;  \[ ] Open PR, include transcript, pass CI, merge.
